title: The Legend of Zelda: A Link to the Past

Original illustration inspired by a retro Action-Adventure game.

A small heroic adventurer with a sword in a windswept fantasy landscape with ruins, a distant landmark, and a traversable path, standing on a windswept path with quiet resolve.

Game metadata:
- Title: The Legend of Zelda: A Link to the Past
- Platform: Game Boy Advance

Visual focus:

- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second

- portable action illustration, saturated but controlled colors, clean handheld readability

- limited color palette when relevant

- mysterious, heroic, mythic

- no clutter

Important:

Output:

- strong contrast
- minimal noise

- no watermark
negative_prompt: avoid resemblance to link, avoid resemblance to zelda, no official character likeness, no copyrighted costume replication, no original enemy designs, no game logo, no UI elements, no screenshot recreation, no exact box art composition, no branded symbols, no text, no abstract shapes, no decorative geometry, no empty background
legal_notes: Risk level high; use generic subject archetypes, readable environments, and platform-coded style only. Downgrade if likeness risk rises.
